dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: prices turn up detected via close > prev_close AND close > sma_5 (5-day MA confirms uptrend). Exit: price closes below 5-day MA (reversal signal, since exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT). Short hold_days_max (5) reflects short-term applicability stated in parameters.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry: prices turn up detected via close > prev_close AND close > sma_5 (5-day MA confirms uptrend). Exit: price closes below 5-day MA (reversal signal, since exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT). Short hold_days_max (5) reflects short-term applicability stated in parameters.

source_rule_text: Buy immediately when prices turn up, using a 5-day moving average to identify short-term trend direction for short time frames.
